utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present); travel_dates (present but not specific dates; says 'to be confirmed'); transportation (provided but not flights, instead public transit/bicycle; missing flight details; also cost likely not covering flights); accommodation (type and cost provided but not a specific hotel selection); activities (type and cost provided but not itemized); additional_services (provided with type and cost); total_budget (single total amount, limited breakdown). Fully specified according to the format requirements: destination is okay; travel_dates requires specific dates—missing; transportation requires flight details with costs—missing; accommodation requires a hotel selection—missing; activities require selected activities with costs—partially but lacks specific selections; additional_services is okay; total_budget requires complete cost breakdown—only a lump sum with partial categories, but not a detailed breakdown; still arguably present. Therefore, fully specified items: destination and additional_services only. total_budget is present but not a 'complete cost breakdown' as required, so not fully specified.
